caption: An older man with grey hair and a black shirt is positioned in front of a plain, light-colored wall. He faces the camera, speaking and subtly shifting his facial expressions. In the top right frame, a blue graphic overlay appears at the bottom of the screen featuring the text "Basil Chapman" and "The Tiger Technicians Hour | June 8th, 2022". The "Tiger-TV" logo is visible in the top right corner of the first and third frames. As the sequence progresses to the bottom frames, the graphic changes to display "Basil Chapman" and a phone number, "1-877-927-6648". A small portion of a blue object is visible on a surface to the man's left. The man remains centered in the frame throughout the clip, with only minor changes in his posture and mouth movements as he continues to talk.
